gui.routinebags.title: Bundles
gui.routinebags.mount.title: Bundles
gui.routinebags.mount.hint_extract: L = stack - R = half - Shift+L = to inventory - click with cursor item = store
gui.routinebags.mount.tooltip_full: Open the full bundle view and return to this container when closed.
gui.routinebags.mount.tooltip_expand: Expand the bundle panel (or press the bound key)
gui.routinebags.mount.tooltip_collapse: Collapse the bundle panel (operations keep running)
gui.routinebags.mount.unavailable: This screen has no reachable player-inventory slots
gui.routinebags.readonly: Read-only (item-form containers can't be edited on vanilla servers)
gui.routinebags.cant_fit: This item can't go inside bundles (vanilla rule)
gui.routinebags.no_bags: No recognizable bags in your inventory
gui.routinebags.filter_bag: Showing only %s (click bag again to clear)
gui.routinebags.hint_extract: L = pick up a stack - R = half stack - Shift+L = to inventory
gui.routinebags.hint_store: L/R click = vanilla pickup - Shift+L = store into a bag
gui.routinebags.hint_bag_vanilla: L with item = insert - R empty-handed = take selected - scroll = select
gui.routinebags.hint_filter: L empty-handed = filter to this bag
gui.routinebags.mode.client_detail: No RoutineBags capability from the server. Operations use paced vanilla inventory clicks.
gui.routinebags.mode.server_detail: Provider: %s. Sorting is handled on the server to avoid latency and click-rate issues.
gui.routinebags.tooltip.sort_client: Sort using the current order. Client script mode sends paced vanilla clicks.
gui.routinebags.tooltip.sort_server: Sort using the current order. Server assist mode applies the result server-side.
gui.routinebags.tooltip.cancel: Stop the current sort or scripted operation. Completed vanilla clicks are not rolled back.
gui.routinebags.tooltip.mode: Cycle sorting order. Affects the grid order and sort target layout.
gui.routinebags.status.server_sort_faile: Server-side sort failed; inventory was left unchanged
gui.routinebags.status.server_store_fail: Server-side store failed; inventory was left unchanged
gui.routinebags.status.server_take_faile: Server-side extraction failed; inventory was left unchanged
gui.routinebags.status.cursor_busy: Put down the item on your cursor before sorting
gui.routinebags.status.bags_full_detail: Won't fit: this item weighs %s unit(s) each, total bag free space is only %s unit(s)
gui.routinebags.status.partial_insert: Bag is full - the leftover is on your cursor
gui.routinebags.status.bundle_cursor_sto: Do not click the aggregate grid while holding a bundle. Put it back first to avoid nesting other bundles into it.
gui.routinebags.status.no_empty_for_half: No empty inventory slot to split a half stack, picked up the whole stack
gui.routinebags.status.no_empty_for_topu: No empty inventory slot to top up a full stack, picked up what was gathered
gui.routinebags.status.bags_full_generic: No bag can hold this item
gui.routinebags.status.leftover_on_curso: Inventory full - leftover items are on your cursor
routinebags.configuration.title: Routine Bags Config
routinebags.configuration.mountInContain: Mount RTbags panel beside container screens
